name: Tom Papa
bio: Tom Papa is an American comedian, actor, and radio host known for warm, optimistic observational stand-up about marriage, family, and modern anxieties. He toured with Jerry Seinfeld early in his career, hosts SiriusXM programs and the podcast Breaking Bread with Tom Papa, and was head writer for the radio variety show Live from Here. He has released stand-up specials including You're Doing Great!, What A Day!, and Home Free.

timeline.ev: Releases debut album Calm, Cool, & Collected
Releases special Live in New York City
Releases Netflix special You're Doing Great!
Releases Netflix special What A Day!

accolades: Head writer and contributor for public radios Live from Here
Recurring panelist on NPRs Wait Wait... Don't Tell Me!
